---
name: "✨ New Prompt Request"
about: Suggest a new prompt template for the promptbook library
title: "[REQUEST] <Proposed Prompt Name>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### 🎯 Purpose
What is the main goal of this new prompt? What problem does it solve?

### 👤 Target Use Case
Who would use this prompt? (e.g., Frontend developers, Cloud Engineers, Data Scientists).

### 🏷️ Proposed Tags
What tags should this prompt have? (e.g., `security`, `frontend`, `db`).

### ✍️ Draft Instructions (Optional)
If you have a draft of the prompt instructions, please paste it here.

```markdown
# Your Draft Heading
Your expert instructions...
```

### 💡 Additional Context
Any other information, links, or examples related to this request.
